code:
%%{Education_StudentDB}}}%%
gantt
    title Resource Allocation Timeline
    dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
    section Planning & Architecture
    Technical Architecture Document    :a1, 2025-01-01, 14d
    UI/UX Design                       :a2, after a1, 21d
    Technical Spikes                   :a3, after a1, 28d

    section Core Development
    Database Schema Implementation     :b1, after a1, 14d
    Authentication & Authorization     :b2, after b1, 14d
    User & Team Management             :b3, after b2, 21d
    Category Management                :b4, after b3, 14d
    Todo Management                    :b5, after b4, 14d
    Admin Portal (Education_ClassroomService)            :b6, after b2, 28d

    section Advanced Features
    Advanced Team & Category Management :c1, after b4, 14d
    Blogging Feature                   :c2, after b5, 21d
    Basic Chat Functionality           :c3, after b3, 21d
    Advanced Chat Features             :c4, after c3, 28d
    Public API                         :c5, after c2, 21d
    Advanced Reporting                 :c6, after c5, 21d

    section Testing & Refinement
    Performance Optimization           :d1, after c4, 14d
    Security Testing                   :d2, after c5, 14d
    User Acceptance Testing            :d3, after d1, 14d

    section Deployment & Training
    Production Deployment              :e1, after d3, 7d
    User Training                      :e2, after e1, 14d
repo_description: Free and Open Source ERP platform
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Education ClassroomService项目制定一个完整的资源分配甘特图。整体周期大概半年，从2025年初开始。先聚焦规划阶段，技术架构文档应该打头阵，预计两周完成，后面UI设计和原型探索可以并行推进。
明白，技术架构文档作为a1节点，14天工期。确认一下：UI设计和技术探索都依赖架构文档完成后才能启动，对吗？另外技术探索给28天，比UI设计的21天更长，是因为要验证更多技术方案？
对的，两个都后置依赖a1。技术探索周期长是因为要验证数据库选型、认证方案等关键技术点。接下来核心开发阶段，数据库Schema实现和认证授权模块要紧密衔接，User & Team Management依赖认证完成后才能动工。
已添加核心开发区块。我注意到Category Management和Todo Management是串行的，但Admin Portal的工期较长且与User & Team Management有并行关系——它是从认证完成后就开始，而不是等所有前置模块都做完？
没错，Admin Portal可以尽早启动，28天周期里和Category、Todo这些业务模块并行开发。高级功能区块里，Advanced Team & Category Management要在基础Category完成后做增强，Blogging Feature则依赖Todo Management。
Chat功能的依赖关系我理一下：Basic Chat在User & Team Management之后启动，Advanced Chat Features又依赖Basic Chat完成。然后Public API要等Blogging做完，Advanced Reporting再后置依赖Public API。这样链条对吗？
链条正确。最后阶段分两块：Testing & Refinement里，Performance Optimization要等高级Chat功能稳定后开始，Security Testing和Public API同步收尾；User Acceptance Testing依赖性能优化完成。Deployment & Training则是生产部署7天，随后两周用户培训。
整体时间线已确认：从2025-01-01的技术架构启动，到Production Deployment和User Training收尾，全程约七个半月。所有依赖关系包括a1后置链、Admin Portal的特殊并行起点、以及Chat和Reporting的递进结构都已落实。
